title: Ran buildah through codespell
body:
Thanks to Dmitry Smirnov @onlyjob for suggesting this tool.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Red Hat CI bailed without any bread crumbs.  You've a few changes that need to be reverted, and a few others that I'd like to see reverted.  Otherwise looks good and you beat me to my Monday morning fun!

:pushpin: Commit d85c395 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
